# Évasion Gusto Coffee

> Barista courses on a Victoria Arduino Prima Pro (single group) and specialty
> coffee sales in Beaumont, Belgium — near Mons, Charleroi and NATO SHAPE.
> The coffee arm of Évasion Gusto, a catering company (https://www.evasiongusto.be).

Languages: French (default, /), English (/en/), Dutch (/nl/).

## Courses (small groups, max 4 people, all equipment provided)
- Mastering Espresso — 3 h — €149/person: grind, dose, distribution, tamping,
  extraction recipes, dialing in, milk texturing and latte art basics.
- Water, Espresso & Filter Coffee — 4 h — €169/person: water chemistry
  (TDS, hardness, alkalinity), building brew water, V60 and batch brew,
  comparative tastings.

## Specialty coffee
Rotating selection of whole-bean specialty coffees in 250 g bags
(e.g. Ethiopia, Colombia, Brazil, decaf), pick-up in Beaumont or at a course.

## Contact & booking
- Form: https://coffee.evasiongusto.be/#contact
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/32480658012
- Email: info@evasiongusto.be
- Address: Rue Orger Meurice 12, 6500 Beaumont, Belgium
